question: Given OHLCV data for AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, GOOGL, and AMZN from 2024-01-01 to 2024-03-31, how should a portfolio be allocated across these 5 stocks and cash? Report per-day allocations and overall risk-adjusted performance.
notes: TradingAgents: per-(ticker,date) signal (BUY/HOLD/SELL) with analyst conclusions
Comparison: signal consistency heatmap, top-10 divergence days
